tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.
Adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects

Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering 2024 Final Proposed Budget, Proposed 2024 Committee Work Plan, Diversity/EEO Report – 3rd Quarter 2023, Year End Holiday Service, and Review of Committee Charter.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering Approval of 2024 Committee Work Plan, Winter Trackwork Programs, and M/W Quarterly Update.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2024, 2023 Annual Operating Results, and Winter Trackwork Programs.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering Annual Elevator/Escalator Report and Spring Trackwork Programs.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering 2023 Annual Ridership Report, May Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs, and Diversity/EEO Report – 4th Quarter 2023.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering Final Review of 2023 Operating Results, Summer Service & Trackwork Programs, LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update, and M/W Quarterly Update.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update, Summer Track Work Programs, and Diversity/EEO Report – 1st Quarter 2024.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering M/W Quarterly Update and September Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering 2025 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment), 2024 Mid-Year Forecast, Fall Trackwork Programs, and Diversity/EEO Report – 2nd Quarter 2024.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering 2025 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment), LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update, Fall Trackwork Programs & Holiday Service, and M/W Quarterly Update.
Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting covering East Side Access Support Projects Update and Winter Trackwork Programs.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee oversees LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan - I. RECURRING AGENDA ITEMS

payload.description: The Long Island Rail Road Committee oversees the Long Island Rail Road through recurring agenda items such as President's Report, Operations Report, Safety Report, Financial Report, and Ridership Report.

tool_args.label: MTA Police reports to LIRR Committee
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Police Report - MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.

payload.description: MTA Police provides a monthly Police Report to the Long Island Rail Road Committee.

tool_args.label: LIRR/MNR PTC Update at May 2024 Committee
tool_args.raw_text: Winter Trackwork Programs Service Planning LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update

payload.description: LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update presented at the May 2024 Committee meeting.

tool_args.label: East Side Access Support Projects Update at November 2024 Committee
tool_args.raw_text: East Side Access Support Projects Update - The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.

payload.description: East Side Access Support Projects Update briefed at the November 2024 Committee meeting.

tool_args.label: LIRR/MNR PTC Update at October 2024 Committee
tool_args.raw_text: LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update - The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out

payload.description: LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update briefed at the October 2024 Committee meeting.

tool_args.label: LIRR/MNR PTC Update at May 2024 Committee (detailed)
tool_args.raw_text: The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

payload.description: LIRR/MNR PTC Project Update briefed at the October 2024 Committee meeting - The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership Report

payload.claim_text: A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
payload.subject: M/W Quarterly Update

tool_args.label: Main Line Second Track part of Summer Track Work
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects

payload.description: Main Line Second Track construction is part of LIRR's trackwork programs supported by schedule adjustments.

tool_args.label: East Side Access Readiness part of Summer Track Work
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects

payload.description: East Side Access Readiness projects are part of LIRR's trackwork programs supported by schedule adjustments.
